title: mallotus intercedens
intro: Mallotus intercedens, also known as the yellow pith or yellow mangrove, is a species of plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Mallotus intercedens include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its use as a topical treatment for wounds and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to harness its therapeutic properties.
